page: OVHcloud c3-16 is a compute-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs running at 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, with no hyperthreading enabled. The hardware configuration includes 16.0 GB of RAM, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. Local storage is provided by a bundled 200 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is established with a baseline bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core scores placing in the top 25% of tested hardware. Text processing and small-model LLM text generation also demonstrate strong performance. Multi-core execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall within the average range. The CPU supports AVX, AES, and SHA_NI instructions, though it lacks AVX-512 capabilities.

The instance offers a cost-efficient profile for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints, though the 2.0 GB of RAM per core represents a tradeoff for memory-intensive applications. It is well-suited for web serving, software compilation, single-threaded processing tasks, and moderate database operations.
description: OVHcloud c3-16 is a compute-optimized virtual server featuring 8 dedicated x86_64 cores powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor running at 2.3 GHz. It is configured with 16.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and includes a 200 GB NVMe SSD for local storage alongside a 1 Gbps network baseline. Benchmark data highlights strong single-core CPU performance and text processing capabilities, while multi-core operations and memory bandwidth perform in the average tier. Lacking hyperthreading and AVX-512 support, this instance represents a balanced tradeoff for compute-heavy tasks that do not demand high memory density. It is suited for software compilation, web serving, and moderate database workloads.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-16 is a compute-optimized server featuring 8 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 16 GB RAM, and a 200 GB NVMe SSD, delivering strong single-core performance for compute-focused workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-16 is a compute-optimized server featuring 8 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 16 GB RAM, and 200 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A dedicated eight-core AMD EPYC compute instance featuring NVMe storage and strong single-core performance for compute-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: Eight dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores with no hyperthreading
16 GB of system memory providing 2 GB per core
Bundled 200 GB NVMe SSD local storage
Strong single-core CPU and text processing benchmark results
1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with one public IPv4 address
Optimized for software compilation, web serving, and compute-heavy tasks
